{{Quote|Does anybody remember the ''Vultar Cataclysm?'' Or the ''Gank Massacres?'' I do! I have lived a ''very long'' time.|[[Shayoto]]|<ref name="darklords3">[[Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith 3|''Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith'' 3]]</ref>}}
The '''Gank Massacres''' took place from [[4800 BBY]] to [[4775 BBY]].

==History==
After the discovery of [[Ryll/Legends|Ryll]], the [[Neimoidian/Legends|Neimoidians]] acquired the distribution rights to the drug. The [[Porporite]]s, a newly discovered [[Species/Legends|species]], quickly became addicted to ryll, whipping them into a homicidal frenzy. The [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] attempted to stop the Porporites by sending the [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]] and conventional military, but they withstood everything the Republic used. Terrified for their safety (and their product), the Neimoidians hired several [[Gank/Legends|Gank]] mercenaries to protect them. Sadly, the Ganks decided that the best course of action was to [[Speciecide|exterminate]] the Porporites. After that, the Ganks embarked on a full scale war against the Republic. [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Vocatara]] was forced to commission the building of [[Juggernaut war droid]]s to end the fighting.

The massacres also saw the first use of the modern [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsabers]], independent of the power packs used during the [[Great Hyperspace War/Legends|Great Hyperspace War]] some [[5000 BBY/Legends|two centuries]] earlier.<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> Also, the [[Rocket-Jumper Elite Advance Unit|Republic rocket-jumpers]] were part of the Republic forces that participated in the conflict.

In [[3997 BBY]],<ref name="NEC" /> [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Shayoto]] mentioned the Gank Massacres during the [[Conclave at Deneba]].<ref name="darklords3" />
